message:
fix(core): use lowercase PRAGMA journal_mode string literal in autocommit test

Tiny test-only fix in `autocommit_txn_tests`: the
`test_retained_autocommit_pragma_journal_mode_flush_prior_batch`
test previously invoked
`conn.query(\"PRAGMA journal_mode = DELETE;\")` but the rest of
the test then asserted against a lowercase `\"delete\"` rendered
mode value. Depending on the PRAGMA parser path this could round-
trip through either case, which made the assertion fragile.
Switch the input to the canonical lowercase single-quoted form
`PRAGMA journal_mode='delete';` so the test exercises exactly
the same casing it asserts on.

No production code change.
